home.title: House keepers Grow your business with
home.description: Discover the power of housekeeping with AIRMANAGE. Streamline, manage, and monitor housekeeping operations with ease.

hostFeatures.createAccountDesc: Create your profile to manage your properties and teams in one place.
hostFeatures.addPropertyDesc: Add your apartment with necessary information for management and cleaning.
hostFeatures.manageListingsDesc: Easily plan and manage cleaning of your properties.
hostFeatures.assignCleanersDesc: Associate cleaners with your properties to automate cleaning tasks.
